description_long: This is a compact, tan-colored combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body and reinforced armor plating. The front features a prominent cannon barrel mounted on a rotating turret, flanked by thick, modular armor panels. On the upper left side, there is a four-tube missile launcher, while the right side displays a cylindrical device, possibly a sensor or secondary weapon. The vehicle moves on wide, black treads suitable for urban terrain, and has several hatches, vents, and a visible antenna for communication. Markings such as 'M2' and geometric symbols are stenciled on the lower panels, and the surface shows minor wear and scuffing, indicating operational use.
description: A tan, heavily-armored tracked combat vehicle with a turret-mounted cannon, missile launcher, and visible 'M2' markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, thick frontal armor, and the left-side missile launcher.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the missile launcher, turret, and side armor details, as well as the antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, treads, and the 'M2' marking on the lower panel.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals a cylindrical device, side armor, and the rear of the missile launcher.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon on the turret front, one four-tube missile launcher on the upper left side, and a cylindrical device (possible secondary weapon or sensor) on the right side.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, modular armor panels; reinforced on the front and sides, with visible wear and sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid tan paint scheme with minor gray and black accents; no complex camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_military_markings: White 'M2' stenciled on lower side panels, geometric arrow symbol above 'M2', and a small colored flag on the right side near the antenna.
